Formerly: FILM332.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

PORT369 Special Topics in Study Abroad III (1-6 Credits) Special topics course taken as part of an approved study abroad program.

Repeatable to: 15 credits if content differs.

PORT386 Experiential Learning (3-6 Credits) Restriction: Permission of ARHU-School of Languages, Literatures, and Cultures department; and junior standing or higher.
